runners.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.83) at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from 10 starts from box 6. Tough field and looking to others this time.
